name: graphy
description: Build and query a knowledge graph of any codebase. Auto-builds in the background and exposes MCP tools (search, neighbors, shortest-path) so Codex can query the graph instead of grepping.

interface.shortDescription: Query a knowledge graph of your codebase instead of grepping.
interface.longDescription: graphy turns a workspace into a queryable knowledge graph and exposes it over MCP. It auto-builds in the background; query symbols, callers, dependencies, and shortest paths through the graphy tools.
